name: shadow-speak-skill
description: Turn English or Japanese video transcripts, subtitles, articles, and sentences into shadowing and review materials.

interface.shortDescription: Turn video text into speaking practice, review cards, and study notes.
interface.longDescription: Shadow Speak helps English and Japanese learners convert YouTube captions, SRT/VTT subtitles, articles, and sentences into shadowing scripts, sentence breakdowns, vocabulary notes, quizzes, Anki CSV cards, and social study check-in copy. It tries only accessible transcript sources and asks users to paste captions when video text is unavailable.
defaultPrompt: 把这段 YouTube 字幕做成影子跟读学习包。
帮我拆解这段英文并生成 Anki CSV。
用日文 N3-N2 水平整理这段字幕。
